trending_videos.title: Black Clover Second Season | Official Trailer 3 | Crunchyroll
trending_videos.description:
A new saga begins! Black Clover Second Season is coming to Crunchyroll in 2026! Watch Black Clover on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-bcpv

In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option!

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

trending_videos.title: Studio DESPERATELY Locks Comments on The Odyssey media – Backlash Goes Nuclear!
trending_videos.description:
The Odyssey Trailer Just Became the MOST DISLIKED in Hollywood History – Epic Backlash Explained! Dive into the massive controversy surrounding The Odyssey movie trailer as it shatters records as the most disliked trailer in Hollywood history, sparking unprecedented fan outrage and viral backlash across YouTube, Twitter, and TikTok. From the studio desperately locking comments on all social media posts to hide the flood of negative reactions, to the cast dropping cringeworthy and downright dumb comments in interviews that only fueled the fire, this video breaks down every shocking detail of the Odyssey trailer disaster. If you're searching for Odyssey movie trailer reaction, biggest Hollywood flops 2026, Odyssey film controversy, cast interview fails, or why the Odyssey adaptation is already doomed, this is the ultimate deep dive you can't miss.
